rationale.D1: Confirmed 7+ IO interfaces (Intake, Flywheel, Turret, Climber, Feeder, Indexer, Hood, Drivetrain) each with Real+Sim implementations selected via when(Robot.model) in every subsystem; IntakeIOSim is commented out but all others are present and wired; no generic parameterized base reused across mechanisms so not L4.
rationale.D2: No Superstructure coordinator, no WantedState/SystemState enums, no RobotManager FSM found; coordination is command composition in ShooterLogic.kt (shoot() sequences Flywheel+Feeder+Indexer) and Bindings.kt button bindings, placing this firmly at L1.
rationale.D3: Confirmed DrivetrainIOSim uses maple-sim SelfControlledSwerveDriveSimulation; FlywheelIOSim uses WPILib FlywheelSim; ClimberIOSim and TurretIOSim use DCMotorSim; however simulationPeriodic() is entirely commented out and IndexerIOSim/FeederIOSim are TODO stubs, so the full sim workflow is incomplete.
rationale.D4: No src/test directory exists; CI workflow only runs ./gradlew build, not ./gradlew test; no test files anywhere in the repo.
rationale.D5: Confirmed full AdvantageKit coverage: @Logged annotation on all input classes (Kotlin KSP equivalent of @AutoLog), Logger.processInputs called in every subsystem's periodic (Drivetrain, Intake, Flywheel, Feeder, Indexer, Climber, Turret, Hood); WPILOGWriter on real robot, NT4Publisher in sim; replay log path configured via LogFileUtil.findReplayLog() but no replay IO variants present so not L4.
rationale.D6: No PathPlanner or Choreo files in deploy or vendordeps; autos are command sequences using therekrab/autopilot library for on-the-fly pose alignment (alignWithAutopilot) with a beeline profile, which is better than dead-reckoning but not authored trajectory files; scored above L1 but below L2.
rationale.D7: Confirmed dual Limelight with MegaTag1+MegaTag2 fusion, per-measurement std-dev tuning based on tag count and distance, rejection logic (field bounds, angle threshold), vision behind AbsolutePoseProvider interface with Real and CameraSimPoseProvider sim variants, addAbsolutePoseMeasurement calls addVisionMeasurement with timestamping; RobotState holds only a single boolean so no time-interpolated buffer world model.
rationale.D8: Confirmed GitHub Actions CI (build only), Nix flake for reproducible dev environment (.envrc), custom KSP annotation processor module (annotation/) showing multi-module engineering discipline; no separate library repo found, README present but minimal.
